content.text: I'll create all 15 component files now. Let me first verify the target directory exists, then create all the necessary subdirectories and files.

data.command: jq -r '"\(.tool_input.command) - \(.tool_input.description // "No description")"' >> ~/.claude/bash-command-log.txt
jq -r '"\(.tool_input.command) - \(.tool_input.description // "No description")"' >> ~/.claude/bash-command-log.txt

content.text: Now I'll create all 15 files in parallel.

data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi

content.text:
All 15 component files have been created successfully. Here is the complete summary of what was written:

**Directory structure created at `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\src\components\`:**

```
components/
├── ScanTabButton.tsx              # Floating scan button for bottom tab bar (haptic feedback, raised circle)
├── ui/
│   ├── Button.tsx                 # Multi-variant button (primary/secondary/outline/danger/ghost, 3 sizes, haptic)
│   ├── Input.tsx                  # Form input with label, error, icon, password toggle
│   ├── Card.tsx                   # Pressable card wrapper with shadow
│   ├── Skeleton.tsx               # Animated skeleton loader + SkeletonCard preset
│   ├── Badge.tsx                  # Status badge (success/warning/error/info/neutral) with compact dot mode
│   ├── EmptyState.tsx             # Empty state with icon, title, description, optional action button
│   └── OfflineBanner.tsx          # NetInfo-powered offline connectivity banner
├── scanner/
│   ├── ScanOverlay.tsx            # QR scan viewport overlay with animated pulsing corners
│   ├── ScanResult.tsx             # Bottom sheet scan result (success/error) with auto-dismiss
│   └── FlashButton.tsx            # Flashlight toggle button for scanner
├── cards/
│   ├── LoyaltyCardMobile.tsx      # Loyalty card tile (hue-generated bg, initials, points/stamps)
│   ├── CircularProgress.tsx       # Animated SVG circular progress ring
│   └── StampsGridMobile.tsx       # Stamps grid with pulsing animation on latest stamp
└── offers/
    └── OfferQRDisplay.tsx         # QR code display for offers with used/expired overlay
```

All files import from `../../theme` (or `../theme` for `ScanTabButton.tsx`) and use the shared `theme` object for colors, spacing, border radius, font sizes, and shadows. External dependencies referenced include `expo-haptics`, `react-native-reanimated`, `react-native-svg`, `react-native-qrcode-svg`, `@react-native-community/netinfo`, and `@astrolab/shared`.
